# [PKT-RLS-005](task-0050): Finalization with Exactly-Once Historical Append

## Purpose

Finalize with exactly-once historical append.

## Scope

- Finalization logic
- Historical append
- Exactly-once guarantee

## Implementation

1. Implement finalization
2. Add historical append
3. Ensure exactly-once

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Finalization works
2. Historical appended
3. Exactly-once verified
